welcome: Hello! I am your pregnancy wellness assistant. I can share general tips for your journey, explain how to use this app, and remind you about checkups. I cannot diagnose or prescribe — always follow your doctor's advice.
trimester_1: Start or continue folic acid only as prescribed by your doctor.
Schedule your first antenatal visit if you have not already.
Rest when tired; mild nausea is common in early pregnancy.
Avoid alcohol, smoking, and unprescribed medicines.
Eat small, frequent meals and stay hydrated.
trimester_2: Continue gentle activity (walking) if your doctor approves.
Eat protein, iron-rich foods, fruits, and vegetables daily.
Sleep on your side as your bump grows.
Watch for swelling; mention sudden severe swelling to your doctor.
trimester_3: Know your birth plan and discuss delivery options with your provider.
Pack a hospital bag and plan how you will reach care in labour.
Monitor baby movements; report reduced movement promptly.
Rest often; avoid heavy lifting unless cleared by your doctor.
Learn true labour signs vs practice contractions from your care team.
red_flags: Severe abdominal pain that does not ease
Sudden swelling of face or hands
Reduced or no baby movements (later pregnancy)
Thoughts of harming yourself — seek urgent help immediately
general_wellness: Take prescribed supplements only; do not self-medicate.
Drink plenty of water through the day.
Attend every antenatal visit and ask questions.
Get adequate sleep and manage stress with support from family.
Use this app's Predict feature only as a guide — your clinician decides care.

app_help.predict: Go to Predict in the menu, fill in your health details, and submit. The app suggests a delivery mode using our ML model — discuss results with your doctor.
app_help.predict_after:
You have already used Predict in this session.

Your latest ML suggestion: {mode}

This is a guide only — not a diagnosis. Your doctor will decide the safest delivery plan based on your full checkups, scans, and hospital guidelines.

• Ask your provider what this suggestion means for you.
• Share any new symptoms or test results at your next visit.
• To try again with updated numbers, open Predict in the menu and submit the form again.
app_help.profile: Open My Profile to update your name, contact details, and photo.
app_help.register: New users register on the site; an admin must approve your account before you can log in.
app_help.pending: If login says pending, wait for admin approval or contact support.
